Career Center

Career Center

Choosing the right university is one of the most important steps on the path to a successful future. With this belief, Doğuş University places great importance not only on providing quality education but also on carrying out initiatives to support its students’ career planning.

The Career Centre, under the Directorate of Health, Culture and Sports Services, organises numerous seminars and conferences throughout the academic year to help students broaden their horizons and find answers to their questions about the future. Furthermore, ‘Career Days’ have been organised annually since 2005. Having become a well-established tradition with a solid foundation and continuing to develop each year, Career Days provide Doğuş University students with the opportunity to meet representatives from various sectors. In addition to creating a broad environment for the exchange of knowledge and experience, Career Days also open doors to internship and employment opportunities. The Career Planning Centre also provides counselling services to students whenever they need them, offering support in areas such as CV preparation, internship and job applications, and career guidance.

Mandatory internships within Doğuş University’s academic programmes, final-year projects, collaborative projects conducted in partnership with public or private sector organisations, and research projects led by academic staff at national and international levels provide students with significant opportunities for practical experience.

For career counselling and further information, please email

[email protected]

to arrange an appointment.
